description: Create a reusable demographics module and transfer it between surveys. In a survey titled 'Lab Master Template', create a Question Group named 'Standard Demographics' containing three questions: DEMO_AGE (Numerical input) with text 'What is your age in years?'; DEMO_EDU (List/Radio) with text 'What is the highest degree or level of school you have completed?' and options E1='Less than high school', E2='High school graduate', E3='Some college or Associate degree', E4='Bachelor\'s degree', E5='Graduate or professional degree'; and DEMO_EMP (Yes/No) with text 'Are you currently employed for wages or salary?'. Export this Question Group to /home/ga/Documents/standard_demographics.lsg. Import this module into a new survey titled 'Social Interaction Study 2024' such that 'Standard Demographics' is the only group in the survey.
